overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character with red hair and cybernetic enhancements walking through a rainy neon-lit city street at night. The character crosses wet streets, walks under overpasses, and stops near buildings with Japanese-inspired red lanterns while neon signs reflect off the wet pavement.

events.description: character begins walking from standing position at the crosswalk
dark vehicle passes by in the background on the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wet crosswalk toward the food stall area on the opposite side

entered.detail: broad striped crosswalk with yellow and white stripes reflecting neon lights
green metal pedestrian barrier along the sidewalk edge
rain-slicked street surface reflecting green and pink neon lights
tall commercial buildings with illuminated signage and advertisements
street food vendor with glowing red paper lanterns and menu displays

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a rain-soaked crosswalk in a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. She begins walking across the striped crosswalk as the camera follows from behind, approaching a food stall with red Japanese-style lanterns. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon signs from the surrounding commercial buildings.

events.description: moving from open street intersection to covered sidewalk beneath overpass
structural column of overpass temporarily blocks view of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk under the elevated overpass structure

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking in the opposite direction under the overpass

entered.detail: wet concrete pavement with red curb markings under the overpass
massive elevated highway or train structure overhead with support columns
concrete building facade with metal security grating

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open intersection into a covered sidewalk area beneath a massive concrete overpass. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon glow and shadow as she walks along the wet pavement. A distant pedestrian walks in the opposite direction while the food stall recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: building corner with red lantern and metal shutter

events.description: character stops walking and stands idle with hands on hips
camera circles character revealing darker shadow areas near the wall

agents.ego_description: standing idle near the wall with hands on hips, looking around the street

notable_agents.action: person walking past in the background along the street

entered.detail: corrugated metal security shutter with graffiti and wear marks
traditional Japanese-style red paper lantern hanging above the shutter

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a building corner featuring a metal shutter door and a glowing red paper lantern. The camera orbits around her as she stands with hands on hips, revealing the darkened corner and the street behind. The lighting is dimmer here, with the red lantern providing a warm glow against the green neon ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street crosswalk with parked vehicles

events.description: character resumes walking away from the wall and back toward the street
black truck drives past on the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking back across the street toward the original sidewalk near the curb

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: dark colored pickup truck moving along the street
raised concrete curb with red paint markings at the street edge

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the corner and walks back across the street, passing through the crosswalk as a black truck drives by. The camera follows her movement back toward the original side of the street, where the metal railing and curb come back into view. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street curb with tree planters and commercial frontage

events.description: character stops at the curb and stands looking around
character turns and begins walking back toward the food stall area

agents.ego_description: standing at the curb observing the street, then turning to walk back toward the food stall

entered.detail: large white rectangular planter with young trees
commercial building facade with glass windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the street curb near a tree planter, observing the quiet neon-lit street. After a moment, she turns and walks back toward the food stall with red lanterns, which comes back into view as she moves. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the green and pink neon lights from the surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection that shifts from vibrant open neon lights into shadowed urban corridors before returning to the glow of a street market. It begins with the character crossing a striped crosswalk where wet asphalt reflects brilliant commercial signs, moving steadily toward a food stall adorned with red Japanese-style lanterns. As she leaves the intersection, the scene shifts into the dim, oppressive shadow of a massive concrete overpass, where the lighting blends neon hues with deep blacks. The camera then orbits around her at a darkened building corner lit by a single red paper lantern before following her back across the street as a black truck drives past. Finally, the movement leads her to a street curb near a tree planter, where she turns and walks back toward the red lanterns of the food stall amidst a sea of reflecting green and pink neon lights.
